data.body: e165 pre-grounding: event ordering = HLC filename prefix {HLC-ts}-{uuid}, reducer replays sorted (reducer/_cache.py:141, _processors.py:538). 'era/merged-log position' for key validity must derive from authoritative merged-log ordering of the identity's KEY lifecycle events (KEY_ADD/ROTATE/REVOKE, each signed by a currently-valid key via bde5; genesis=TOFU), NOT attacker-set event timestamps. Validity-at-era: fold KEY events up to event E's era, verify E's signing key in valid-set. Hardest leaf - needs focused design pass + likely several plan rounds. Deferred detailed plan until bde5 lands.
